{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus sword
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] held a red-bladed [[Ragnarus sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] possesses a [[Ragnarus sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
